zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth of Carinthia於1263年出生在德國貝也明陳時，她的父親Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol25歲，母親Elisabeth von Bayern36歲。她於1274年12月20日與Albrecht II von Habsburg在奧地利維恩結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1313年10月28日在瑞士阿高文迪可特格斯費爾登享年50歲，埋葬在德國史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維斯福特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth of Carinthia于1263年出生在德国貝也明陳时，她的父亲Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol25岁，母亲Elisabeth von Bayern36岁。她于1274年12月20日与Albrecht II von Habsburg在奥地利維恩结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1313年10月28日在瑞士阿高文迪可特格斯費爾登享年50岁，埋葬在德国史萊斯維-爾斯坦可萊斯 史萊斯維斯福特。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

historicEvents.description: Three valleys in Central Switzerland unite against the counts of Habsburg and fight for autonomy. Cities join the confederacy. They conquer territories in northern and southern Switzerland.

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth of Carinthia was born in 1263, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol, was 25 and her mother, Elisabeth von Bayern, was 36. She married Albrecht II von Habsburg on 20 December 1274, in Vienna, Austria. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 October 1313, in Königsfelden, Windisch, Aargau, Switzerland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Stift, Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth of Carinthia est née en 1263, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth von Bayern, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Albrecht II von Habsburg le 20 décembre 1274, à Vienne, Autriche. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 octobre 1313, à Königsfelden, Windisch, Argovie, Suisse, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Stift, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth of Carinthia 1263 in München, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol 25 und ihre Mutter Elisabeth von Bayern 36. Sie hat am 20. Dezember 1274 in Wien, Österreich Albrecht II von Habsburg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. Oktober 1313 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Königsfelden, Windisch, Aargau, Schweiz und wurde in Stift, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth of Carinthia è nata il nel 1263 nel München, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Elisabeth von Bayern, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Albrecht II von Habsburg il 20 dicembre 1274, nel Wien, Austria. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 ottobre 1313, nel Königsfelden, Windisch, Argovia, Svizzera, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Stift, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Germania.

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth of Carinthia(이)가 1263년 독일 베이른 u천에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elisabeth von Bayern(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1274년 12월 20일 오스트리아 빈에서 Albrecht II von Habsburg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1313년 10월 28일 스위스 아아르가 윈디슈 ko니그스펠든에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 슐레스위그-홀스타인 크레이스 슐레스위그 스티프트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth of Carinthia nasceu em 1263, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth von Bayern, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Albrecht II von Habsburg em 20 de dezembro de 1274, em Wien, Áustria. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de outubro de 1313, em Königsfelden, Windisch, Aargau, Suiça, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Stift, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth of Carinthia родилась в 1263 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth von Bayern, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Albrecht II von Habsburg 20 декабря 1274 г. в местности Вена, Австрия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 октября 1313 г. в местности кoнигсфелден, виндищ, ааргау, Швейцария в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности стифт, крис щлесвиг, щлесвиг-холстин, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth of Carinthia nació en 1263, en München, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Meinhard IV von Görtz Tirol, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elisabeth von Bayern, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Albrecht II von Habsburg el 20 de diciembre de 1274, en Wien, Austria. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de octubre de 1313, en Königsfelden, Windisch, Aargau, Suiza, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Stift, Kreis Schleswig, Schleswig-Holstein, Alemania.
